latin: Propter catellum? ita, propter catellum. uxor moriens ei canem dederat ut ne solus esset. illi canem occiderunt. nunc solvent.

questions.prompt: Why had his dying wife given him a puppy?
questions.target: So he would not be alone
choices: So he would not be alone

questions.prompt: What will happen to those who killed the dog?

translation: Over a puppy? Yes, over a puppy. His dying wife had given him a dog so he would not be alone. They killed the dog. Now they will pay.
